overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character traverses covered commercial walkways, crosses intersections with wet reflective pavement, and passes by the iconic 'Fourth Wall' building and various digital billboards.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered commercial corridor with wet reflective pavement

tall vertical neon light fixture emitting bright blue light
large digital advertisement screen displaying beverage branding
reflective wet tiled ground surface mirroring the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered commercial corridor with overhead canopies and neon lighting. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant blue and purple neon lights from surrounding storefronts. Digital billboards line the walls as the character approaches an intersection visible in the distance.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with visible sky
silver sedan drives past while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk at the urban intersection

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: large beige building with prominent blue neon 'FOURTH WALL' signage
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
dark asphalt street surface with traffic markings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open intersection. The prominent Fourth Wall building with its large blue neon sign dominates the right side. The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk as a silver sedan passes by, moving from the sheltered corridor into the exposed street environment.

events.description: purple sports car drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the Fourth Wall building and various storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive screen displaying stock market graphs and advertisements
bright red automated vending unit on the sidewalk
green illuminated signage for the All Foods market storefront

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk with the Fourth Wall building receding on the right, the character passes towering digital billboards displaying advertisements and stock tickers. A purple sports car drives past on the adjacent road. Palm trees line the street and neon signs illuminate the dusk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban sidewalk with convenience store

events.description: passing the All Foods storefront with green neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrower sidewalk section past the All Foods market

entered.detail: ground-level convenience store with bright interior lighting and green signage
illuminated vending machine displaying beverage advertisements
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the All Foods convenience store with its distinctive green neon signage and beverage vending machines. The sidewalk narrows as buildings close in, creating an urban canyon effect. In the distance, the Avalon tower rises against the darkening sky while traffic continues to flow along the adjacent street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from a sheltered corridor into an expansive, towering urban canyon. It begins within a covered walkway where blue and purple neon lights reflect off wet pavement, moving steadily toward a distant intersection. As the character emerges from the canopy, the scene opens into a wide street dominated by the glowing blue sign of the Fourth Wall building and the movement of passing vehicles across a yellow-striped crosswalk. The camera then tracks along a concrete sidewalk past towering digital billboards and palm trees, while the lighting shifts to a deep dusk atmosphere. Finally, the view narrows as the character passes the green neon signage of an All Foods store, with the massive Avalon tower rising in the distance against the darkening sky.
